metadata.description: 11 outcome-named autonomous fleets for the Orca runtime

plugins.name: orca-fleet
plugins.description: 11 outcome-named autonomous fleets for the Orca runtime. Each mission is one outcome with its own state machine and an evidence-backed definition of done: ship-it, clean-sweep, oss-contribute, harden-it, speed-it, modernize-it, prove-it, deflake-it, review-it, map-it, root-cause.
